nasb.text: For to this end also I wrote, so that I might put you to the test, whether you are obedient in all things.

esv.text: For this is why I wrote, that I might test you and know whether you are obedient in everything.

cnv.text: 為這緣故，我寫了那封信，要考驗你們是不是凡事都順從。

ccb.text: 为此，我也曾写信给你们，想知道你们是否凡事顺服。

csbs.text: 其实我也为此写了信，就是要知道你们经过考验的品德：你们是否在一切事上都顺从。
